skill.name: The Blackest Night

skill.description: During Dreamspell, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
skill.name: Dreamspell Boon I

skill.description: During Dreamspell, adds special items to quest rewards, and greatly boosts attack and defense.
skill.name: Dreamspell Boon II

skill.description: Lets you carve one additional time from carcasses during quests. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
skill.name: Carving Master

skill.description: Lets you carve one additional time from carcasses during quests. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
skill.name: Carving Master

skill.description: Increases elemental attack when large monsters become enraged.
skill.name: Mutual Hostility I

skill.description: Level I effect is increased, and you gain a temporary damage barrier. (Barrier reactivates after cooldown.)
skill.name: Mutual Hostility II

skill.description: Restores a moderate amount of health when destroying a wound on a large monster.
skill.name: Decimator I

skill.description: Restores health when destroying a wound on a large monster.
skill.name: Decimator II

skill.description: Increases attack and defense after fainting during a quest. (Can be used twice.)
skill.name: Fortify

skill.description: Increases attack after recovering from webbed status, frostblight, being pinned, or a Power Clash.
skill.name: Binding Counter I

skill.description: Greatly increases attack after recovering from webbed status, frostblight, being pinned, or a Power Clash.
skill.name: Binding Counter II

skill.description: Boosts attack and lowers defense but lets you survive one lethal hit. Afterwards, boosts defense and res.
skill.name: Guts (Tenacity)

skill.description: During Lumenhymn, adds special items to quest rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
skill.name: Lumenhymn Boon I

skill.description: During Lumenhymn, adds special items to quest rewards, and greatly boosts attack and defense.
skill.name: Lumenhymn Boon II

skill.description: Lets you carve one additional time from carcasses during quests. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
skill.name: Carving Master

skill.description: Temporarily increases affinity and can deal extra thunder damage upon buildup. (Excludes some attacks.)
skill.name: Azure Bolt I

skill.description: Further increases additional thunder damage and moderately extends the duration affinity is increased.
skill.name: Azure Bolt II

skill.description: Increases attack and defense after fainting during a quest. (Can be used twice.)
skill.name: Fortify

skill.description: Increases your affinity temporarily when sliding on terrain.
skill.name: Affinity Sliding

skill.description: Infects you with Frenzy when against large monsters.
skill.name: Black Eclipse I

skill.description: Infects you with Frenzy and raises attack when against large monsters. Attack power increases upon recovery.
skill.name: Black Eclipse II

skill.description: Increases quest target rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
skill.name: Luck

skill.description: Regenerates a small amount of your health as you continually attack a monster. Recovery varies by weapon.
skill.name: Hasten Recovery I

skill.description: Regenerates your health as you continually attack a monster. Recovery varies by weapon.
skill.name: Hasten Recovery II

skill.description: Boosts attack and lowers defense but lets you survive one lethal hit. Afterwards, boosts defense and res.
skill.name: Guts (Tenacity)

skill.description: Lets you carve one additional time from carcasses during quests. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)
